description: Sector Rotation & Money Flow Dashboard (#4) v1.0. 11 SPDR sectors + 14 cross-sector ratios. 9 institutional signals composite-scored 0-100: RS+slope+acceleration, Chaikin Money Flow, OBV slope, MFI, position vs 20/50/200 DMA, volume surge, regime-expected leadership, sub-sector confirmation. Early-rotation alerts via Telegram.
